name: pi-agile-coach
description_en: Universal agile coach for pi and Claude Code — structures any project (software, design, hardware, marketing, operations) into sprints with full SDD cycle: backlog, sprint planning, verification, retro, and decision memory. Integrates with any skill.
description_zh: 面向 pi 和 Claude Code 的通用敏捷教练 — 将任何项目（软件、设计、硬件、营销、运营）构造成具有完整 SDD 周期的冲刺：待办事项、冲刺计划、验证、回顾和决策记忆。与任何技能集成
